title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Today's main star is Daiwa Scarlet! I don't care
what anyone says!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Vodka couldn't enter 'cause of her
injury, so I hope Scarlet does really well in her
place.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
This year, a brilliant Umamusume truly fit to be
queen has appeared! Ohoho, I hope she is
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Does wearing a tiara make you a princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Or is it something you become through
everyone's acceptance and praise?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, I'll keep on challenging myself. I'll continue to
fight for my own sake—to become my ideal
princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: No matter where I am, I'll walk my own path.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And when I reach the end of that path, it won't
matter if others disagree—I will be a princess in
my own eyes.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure your journey will serve as a guide for
others, too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Always unyielding, noble, and resolute! I'll
elegantly send everyone flying with a good
wallop!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the Queen Elizabeth II Cup! Taking
to the track today is Daiwa Scarlet, the Crimson
Queen and winner of two tiaras on the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will she be able to finish the job for her friend
Vodka?! We're expecting a fine performance!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Let's have a good race, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm thrilled that I get to go head-to-head
against someone as impressive as you!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Who will be crowned queen this year?!
Go, Crimson Queen!
Win it for Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've finally arrived! Look, there's an
exceptional Umamusume in the running for queen
this year. Come, the seat next to me is free.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, but I will have to regretfully decline
your offer. I've come here today with my son and
his friend, you see.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? How unfortunate. But even if we
aren't together, let's both cheer for the Crimson
Queen!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Mom! Hurry up! It's gonna start!

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text: Just wait, Ken. I'm coming now.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
...Let's hope that princess is the one who becomes
queen.

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Make sure you watch, Mom! Kawakami
Princess is an amazing runner!

text_block_list.name: Suntanned Boy
text_block_list.text:
She's the ultimate princess! I want to be just like
her!
